nasb.text: They hold fast to themselves an evil purpose; They talk of laying snares secretly; They say, “Who can see them?”

esv.text: They hold fast to their evil purpose; they talk of laying snares secretly, thinking, “Who can see them?”

cnv.text: 他們彼此鼓勵，設下惡計， 商議暗設網羅，說： “誰能看見它們呢？”

ccb.text: 他们狼狈为奸， 商量暗设网罗， 以为谁也看不见。

csbs.text: 他们彼此怂恿去做恶事， 彼此商量要暗设陷阱，说： “谁能看见这些呢？”
